title: feat: add request safety checking to gen
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Guardrails for the Garden
gist.blurb: We've added an optional safety layer to our generation endpoints. Just pass the `safe` flag to keep your prompts and outputs family-friendly and secure!
gist.summary: Introduced an optional request safety checking mechanism across generation endpoints using AWS Bedrock Guardrails.
gist.impact: Developers can now enforce content moderation on their API requests by passing a `safe` parameter or `Pollinations-Safe` header, ensuring inputs and outputs remain appropriate.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny crossing guard vest and holding a stop sign, standing next to a glowing green gate or fence protecting a garden of code-plants. The Nomnom creature is safely behind the fence.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny crossing guard vest and holding a stop sign, standing next to a glowing lime green (#ecf874) picket fence protecting a garden of code-plants. The round Nomnom creature sits safely behind the fence eating a clean document. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
